Tax Services

Tax Services

Comprehensive Tax Solutions for Your Business Success

Schedule Consultation

Professional Tax Solutions

Gulf Star Accounting is a tax agency accredited by the Federal Tax Authority in the United Arab Emirates. Our tax experts provide integrated assistance in various tax disciplines, offering solutions and comprehensive strategies to solve complex tax-related issues.

Tax Consultants

Expert tax consultation services to guide you through complex tax regulations and compliance requirements.

Tax Agent

Authorized tax agent representation, we communicate with tax offices and handle all submission requirements.

Tax Audit Support

Comprehensive audit support for all types of tax audits to ensure compliance and prevent delays.

Tax Registration

Complete assistance with tax registration and de-registration processes with all relevant authorities.

VAT Returns Filing

Accurate and timely VAT return preparation and filing in accordance with tax laws and regulations.

VAT Refunds

Process VAT refund applications for businesses operating in free zones with proper documentation.

Reconciliation Requests

Submit reconciliation requests with strong documentation for review and resolution with tax authorities.

Excise Tax Services

Registration, compliance reporting, and management of excise tax liabilities with expert support.

Why Choose Gulf Star Accounting?

1

Certified Experts

Team of tax experts certified by the Federal Tax Authority with proven track records.

2

Comprehensive Solutions

End-to-end tax services tailored to your specific business needs and requirements.

3

Technology Driven

Modern tax software and cloud-based solutions for efficient tax management.

4

Compliance Assured

Full regulatory compliance and FTA audit support to keep you protected.

Get In Touch Today

Get in touch today and see how smooth, reliable tax services can power your next stage of growth.
